items.title: Beating Arsenal puts Man United into Premier League title race
items.summary: Man United are 12 points behind league-leading Arsenal, but after beating the Gunners on Sunday, can the Red Devils pull off an unlikely title push?

items.title: Scheffler wins 20th PGA Tour title at American Express
items.summary: Scottie Scheffler won The American Express, finishing on 27 under par, four shots ahead of his nearest challengers.

items.title: Patriots beat Broncos in near blizzard to book Super Bowl spot
items.summary: The New England Patriots booked their place at Super Bowl LX as they edged out the Denver Broncos 10-7 in near blizzard conditions in the AFC Championship game.

items.title: Arteta challenges 'poor' Arsenal after Man Utd loss
items.summary: Mikel Arteta has challenged Arsenal to show the mental strength to win the Premier League after falling to a nervous 3-2 home defeat against Manchester United.

items.title: Oviedo coach: Yamal goal from 'another galaxy'
items.summary: Real Oviedo coach Guillermo Almada branded Lamine Yamal a player from "another galaxy" after the Barcelona forward's wonder goal in Sunday's LaLiga meeting between the two sides.

items.title: Juve's Spalletti sees McKennie as 'perfect' striker
items.summary: Juventus coach Luciano Spalletti advocated for United States midfielder Weston McKennie to play in a more offensive position after his team beat Napoli 3-0 on Sunday.

items.title: Carrick cool after Arsenal win: Big games coming
items.summary: Michael Carrick said Manchester United have "bigger games to come" after a 3-2 victory against Premier League leaders Arsenal.

items.title: 'Another unbelievable result' - but what's different about Man Utd now?
items.summary: MOTD pundit Danny Murphy explains how Manchester United earned their impressive win at Premier League leaders Arsenal, and how he feels the Gunners will react.

items.title: Samenvatting: Ajax heeft weinig moeite met FC Volendam
items.summary: Ajax boekte zaterdag een tamelijk eenvoudige zege op FC Volendam. Bekijk hier in samenvatting hoe Youri Baas met twee treffers de grote man werd in de Johan Cruijff Arena.

items.title: Samenvatting: Feyenoord in rommelige wedstrijd langs Heracles
items.summary: Feyenoord heeft eindelijk weer eens een wedstrijd gewonnen in de Eredivisie. De ploeg van Robin van Persie scoorde vier keer, incasseerde twee tegengoals en zag belangrijke spelers uitvallen. Bekijk hier de samenvatting.

items.title: Samenvatting: PSV verslikt zich in NAC Breda
items.summary: PSV heeft in eigen huis tegen NAC Breda ternauwernood een nederlaag voorkomen. Bekijk hier hoe de ploeg van Carl Hoefkens het de koploper bijzonder lastig maakte.

items.title: Pavlidis bovenaan Portugese topscorerslijst, Cabral MOTM
items.summary: Zondag werd er weer volop gevoetbald in binnen- en buitenland. Lees hieronder terug hoe het op de Nederlandse velden en daarbuiten is verlopen.

items.title: Hardly anyone would have picked Carrick to be Man Utd boss - but now?
items.summary: As Michael Carrick's perfect start at Manchester United continues, is he building a case for the job longer term?

items.title: Go Ahead Eagles-opponent Braga vernedert Alverca in eerste helft
items.summary: Sporting Braga heeft een ideale generale repetitie gekend in aanloop naar het Europa League-duel met Go Ahead Eagles. De nummer vier van Portugal maakte vier goals in de eerste helft tegen middenmoter FC Alverca en daarna kon het vizier op de ontmoeting in Deventer.

items.title: Why Arsenal's wobble may not even matter - despite 'feeling pressure'
items.summary: Arsenal's winless run may normally be cause for concern - but the stats suggest they are still in control of the Premier League title race.

items.title: Lucas Paquetá edges towards West Ham exit after £35.8m Flamengo bid
items.summary: Brazilian club make improved offer for 28-year-old Sale would allow further transfer spending Flamengo are locked in negotiations with West Ham after making a new £35.8m bid for Lucas Paquetá. Although the offer has not been accepted there is growing optimism on Flamengo’s side that they will secure the Brazil international. The clubs are focused on the payment structure of the deal and it is understood that it is moving in the right direction. Continue reading...

items.title: ‘We got punished’: Arteta rues errors as Arsenal’s title tilt stalls with United loss
items.summary: Zubimendi mistake led to Mbeumo equaliser ‘We were dominant … after we gave them the goal’ Mikel Arteta blamed individual errors for Arsenal’s 3-2 defeat against Manchester United, on a weekend when their lead in the Premier League title race was cut to four points. Arsenal were 1-0 up when the game was transformed by Martín Zubimendi’s mis‑hit back-pass, which presented Bryan Mbeumo with an equaliser. United scored with outstanding strikes from distance by Patrick Dorgu and Matheus Cunha in the second half to stun the leaders. Continue reading...

items.title: Arsenal their own worst enemy as Carrick's dream Man Utd start continues
Villa 'extraordinary' in first win at Newcastle since infamous 2005 trip
items.summary: Aston Villa produce 'extraordinary' performance as they claim their first win at Newcastle since the infamous 2005 encounter

items.title: 'Intoxicating title fight impossible to call as Hearts refuse to buckle'
items.summary: Depleted Scottish Premiership leaders Hearts passed the latest test of their mettle in compelling draw with Celtic, writes Tom English.
